examples: Nouelia Franchet is a monotype genus of Compositae.
The prototypes of the monotype basins can further be divided into craton basins, extensional basins and compressional basins.
Monotype: Proprietary name for Monotype's hot - metal type - casting machine which assembles characters individually rather than line - by - line.
Accordingly, MIT AgeLab and Monotype Imaging are researching the effect of typeface on driver distraction.
Printers are either in decline, or at best stable, so people think Monotype serves a dying industry.
